llm_generated_explanation.summary: Patient with SLCO1B1 normal metabolizer phenotype from rs4149056 variant. Simvastatin is metabolized via hepatic uptake mediated by SLCO1B1. Normal enzyme activity results in typical statin metabolism and efficacy.
llm_generated_explanation.biological_mechanism: The rs4149056 (SLCO1B1 *1) variant has no functional impact. Normal SLCO1B1 function results in standard hepatic uptake and metabolism of simvastatin, leading to expected therapeutic outcomes.

variant_effects.rs4149056: No change in function - normal SLCO1B1 activity
